raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"behavioral_fact","confidence":0.89,"matched_text":"It is not common for parents to flush their children's diapers down the toilet.","distilled_fact":"It is not common for parents to flush their children's diapers down the toilet."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"product_property","confidence":0.84,"matched_text":"diapers are made of materials that do not break down easily in water","distilled_fact":"Diapers are made of materials that do not break down easily in water."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"recommendation","confidence":0.86,"matched_text":"Therefore, it is generally recommended to dispose of diapers in a trash bin.","distilled_fact":"It is generally recommended to dispose of diapers in a trash bin."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"behavioral_fact","confidence":0.83,"matched_text":"it is possible that some parents may choose to flush diapers down the toilet anyway, despite the potential problems it can cause.","distilled_fact":"Some parents may choose to flush diapers down the toilet anyway."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"recommendation","confidence":0.81,"matched_text":"This is not a recommended practice and should be avoided whenever possible.","distilled_fact":"Flushing diapers down the toilet is not a recommended practice and should be avoided whenever possible."}]}
